nasb.text: Then all the princes of the sea will go down from their thrones, remove their robes and strip off their embroidered garments. They will clothe themselves with trembling; they will sit on the ground, tremble every moment and be appalled at you.

esv.text: Then all the princes of the sea will step down from their thrones and remove their robes and strip off their embroidered garments. They will clothe themselves with trembling; they will sit on the ground and tremble every moment and be appalled at you.

cnv.text: 那時所有沿海的君王都必由王座下來，除去朝服，脫下刺繡的衣服；披上戰兢，坐在地上，不停發抖，因你而驚駭。

ccb.text: 沿海诸王因你而恐惧，都从宝座上下来，除去王袍，脱掉锦衣，坐在地上发抖。
